vba_modules.name: Calculations.bas
vba_modules.code:
Attribute VB_Name = "Calculations"
Option Explicit
Option Private Module

Public Const ScratchCol = 10
Public Const ListCol = 1
Public Const CohortAddr = "B1"
Const hardfail = &H3366FF
Const softfail = &H99CCFF
Const compensate = &HFFDC00
Const overridden = &HF4ACA8

Sub doCalculate(ByRef control As IRibbonControl)
    AutoComp.Show
End Sub

Private Function HasNumber(value) As Boolean
    If IsError(value) Then
        HasNumber = False
    ElseIf value = "" Then
        HasNumber = False
    Else
        HasNumber = IsNumeric(value)
    End If
End Function

Sub CalculateAll()
    Dim prog_re As New RegExp
    Dim sheet As Worksheet
    
    prog_re.Pattern = "^[^a-z]*_[^a-z]*$"
    For Each sheet In ActiveWorkbook.Worksheets
        If prog_re.Test(sheet.Name) Then
            CalculateSheet sheet
        End If
    Next
End Sub

Sub CalculateSheet(ByRef sheet As Worksheet)
    Dim mod_re As New RegExp, prog_re As New RegExp
    Dim programme As String, val As String, module As String
    Dim DCol As New Dictionary, Credits As New Dictionary
    Dim cell As Range, student As Range
    Dim available_credits As Integer, available_mark_credits As Integer
    Dim missed_credits As Integer, achieved_credits As Integer, comp_credits As Integer
    Dim n As Integer
    Dim CanCompensate As Boolean
    Dim C As Double, v As Double, comp As Double
    
    mod_re.Pattern = "^[A-Z]+[35689]\d\d$"
    prog_re.Pattern = "^([^a-z]*)_([^a-z]*)$"
    If Not prog_re.Test(sheet.Name) Then
        Exit Sub
    End If
    programme = prog_re.Replace(sheet.Name, "$1:$2")
    
    ' Gather information from the header rows
    For Each cell In sheet.UsedRange.Rows(1).Columns
        val = cell.value
        If mod_re.Test(val) Then
            If Not DCol.Exists("first_module") Then
                DCol.Add "first_module", cell.Column
            End If
            DCol.Item("last_module") = cell.Column
            Credits.Item(cell.Column) = cell.Offset(1, 0).value
        End If
        DCol.Item(cell.value) = cell.Column
    Next
    If DCol.Exists("Stage 3") Then
        DCol.Item("Total") = DCol.Item("Stage 3")
    End If
    
    sheet.UsedRange.Interior.Pattern = xlPatternNone
    ' Work through the students
    For Each student In sheet.UsedRange.Rows
        Dim s As Range
        Set s = student.Columns
        If IsEmpty(s(1)) Or s(1) = "" Then GoTo next_row
        If Not HasNumber(s(DCol("Total"))) Then GoTo next_row
        
        available_credits = 0
        available_mark_credits = 0
        missed_credits = 0
        achieved_credits = 0
        For n = DCol("first_module") To DCol("last_module")
            Set cell = s(n)
            C = Credits(n)
            If HasNumber(cell.value) Then
                available_credits = available_credits + C
                available_mark_credits = available_mark_credits + C
                If cell.value < 40 Then
                    missed_credits = missed_credits + C
                Else
                    achieved_credits = achieved_credits + C
                End If
            End If
            If cell.value = "F" Then
                missed_credits = missed_credits + C
                available_credits = available_credits + C
            ElseIf cell.value = "P" Then
                achieved_credits = achieved_credits + C
                available_credits = available_credits + C
            End If
        Next
        CanCompensate = (missed_credits <= available_credits / 4) And _
                (student.Columns(DCol("Total")).value >= 40)
        comp = 0
        comp_credits = 0
        For n = DCol("first_module") To DCol("last_module")
            Set cell = s(n)
            If HasNumber(cell.value) Then
                C = Credits(n)
                v = cell.value
                If v < 30 Then
                    cell.Interior.Color = hardfail
                ElseIf v < 40 Then
                    module = sheet.UsedRange.Cells(1, n).value
                    If CanCompensate And AutoComp.Ok(module, programme) Then
                        cell.Interior.Color = compensate
                        comp = comp + (40 - v) * C
                        comp_credits = comp_credits + C
                    Else
                        cell.Interior.Color = softfail
                    End If
                End If
            End If
        Next
        comp = comp / available_mark_credits
        Select Case AutoComp.Cohort()
            Case "stage1"
                s(DCol("Comp")).value = comp
                achieved_credits = achieved_credits + comp_credits
                s(DCol("Credits")).value = achieved_credits
                If achieved_credits < available_credits Then
                    s(DCol("Class")).value = "FAIL"
                Else
                    Select Case s(DCol("Total"))
                        Case Is >= 70
                            s(DCol("Class")).value = "DIST"
                        Case Is >= 60
                            s(DCol("Class")).value = "MERIT"
                        Case Is >= 40
                            s(DCol("Class")).value = "PASS"
                        Case Else
                            s(DCol("Class")).value = "FAIL"
                    End Select
                End If
            Case "stage2"
                s(DCol("Comp")).value = comp
                achieved_credits = achieved_credits + comp_credits
                s(DCol("Credits")).value = achieved_credits
                If achieved_credits < available_credits Then
                    s(DCol("Class")).value = "FAIL"
                Else
                    Select Case s(DCol("Total"))
                        Case Is >= 40
                            s(DCol("Class")).value = "PROC"
                        Case Else
                            s(DCol("Class")).value = "FAIL"
                    End Select
                End If
            Case "stage3"
                s(DCol("Comp")).value = comp
                achieved_credits = achieved_credits + comp_credits
                If DCol.Exists("CO790") Then
                    s(DCol("Credits")).value = achieved_credits + 360
                Else
                    s(DCol("Credits")).value = achieved_credits + 240
                End If
                If achieved_credits < available_credits Then
                    s(DCol("Class")).value = "FAIL"
                Else
                    Select Case s(DCol("Final")).value
                        Case Is >= 70
                            s(DCol("Class")).value = "FIRST"
                        Case Is >= 60
                            s(DCol("Class")).value = "2(I)"
                        Case Is >= 50
                            s(DCol("Class")).value = "2(II)"
                        Case Is >= 40
                            s(DCol("Class")).value = "PASS"
                        Case Else
                            s(DCol("Class")).value = "FAIL"
                    End Select
                End If
            Case "pgtjune"
                s(DCol("Comp")).value = comp
                achieved_credits = achieved_credits + comp_credits
                s(DCol("Credits")).value = achieved_credits
                If achieved_credits < available_credits Then
                    s(DCol("Class")).value = "FAIL"
                Else
                    Select Case s(DCol("Total"))
                        Case Is >= 40
                            s(DCol("Class")).value = "PROC"
                        Case Else
                            s(DCol("Class")).value = "FAIL"
                    End Select
                End If
            Case "pgtfinal"
                s(DCol("Comp")).value = comp
                achieved_credits = achieved_credits + comp_credits
                s(DCol("Credits")).value = achieved_credits
                If achieved_credits < available_credits Then
                    s(DCol("Class")).value = "FAIL"
                Else
                    Select Case s(DCol("Total"))
                        Case Is >= 70
                            s(DCol("Class")).value = "DIST"
                        Case Is >= 60
                            s(DCol("Class")).value = "MERIT"
                        Case Is >= 40
                            s(DCol("Class")).value = "PASS"
                        Case Else
                            s(DCol("Class")).value = "FAIL"
                    End Select
                End If
        End Select
next_row:
    Next
End Sub

vba_modules.name: AutoComp.frm
vba_modules.code:
Attribute VB_Name = "AutoComp"
Attribute VB_Base = "0{81103E48-B47A-4043-8B94-103B6D4341B6}{E75E7A44-EBF1-4CB2-903D-1F3740B2C039}"
Attribute VB_GlobalNameSpace = False
Attribute VB_Creatable = False
Attribute VB_PredeclaredId = True
Attribute VB_Exposed = False
Attribute VB_TemplateDerived = False
Attribute VB_Customizable = False
Option Explicit

Dim wb As Workbook
Dim scratchWs As Worksheet
Dim cohortCell As Range
Dim Dict As New Dictionary

Private Sub CancelButton_Click()
    Me.Hide
End Sub

Private Sub ActiveButton_Click()
    CalculateSheet ActiveSheet
    Me.Hide
End Sub

Private Sub EditButton_Click()
    EditNoncomps.Show
    LoadNoncomps
End Sub

Private Sub PGTFinalButton_Click()
    SaveCohort
End Sub

Private Sub PGTJuneButton_Click()
    SaveCohort
End Sub

Private Sub AllButton_Click()
    CalculateAll
    Me.Hide
End Sub

Private Sub Stage1Button_Click()
    SaveCohort
End Sub

Private Sub Stage2Button_Click()
    SaveCohort
End Sub

Private Sub Stage3Button_Click()
    SaveCohort
End Sub

Sub SaveCohort()
    Dim C As control
    For Each C In Me.Frame1.Controls
        If C.value Then
                cohortCell.value = C.Tag
        End If
    Next
End Sub

Sub LoadNoncomps()
    Dim scratch As Range
    Dim n As Integer
    Set scratch = scratchWs.Columns(1)
    n = 1
    Uncompensated.Clear
    Dict.RemoveAll
    While scratch.Rows(n).value <> ""
        Uncompensated.AddItem scratch.Rows(n).value
        Dict.Add scratch.Rows(n).value, 1
        n = n + 1
    Wend
End Sub

Private Sub UserForm_Activate()
    Set wb = ActiveWorkbook
    Set scratchWs = wb.Worksheets("Scratch")
    Set cohortCell = scratchWs.Range(CohortAddr)
    Dim C As control
    For Each C In Me.Frame1.Controls
        C.value = (C.Tag = cohortCell.value)
    Next
    LoadNoncomps
End Sub

Function Ok(module As String, programme As String) As Boolean
    Ok = Not (Dict.Exists(module & "+any") Or Dict.Exists(module & "+" & programme))
End Function

Function Cohort() As String
    Cohort = scratchWs.Range(CohortAddr).value
End Function

vba_modules.name: EditNoncomps.frm
vba_modules.code:
Attribute VB_Name = "EditNoncomps"
Attribute VB_Base = "0{C77CCDC3-2B58-46CE-B1C4-46BE754902D3}{4C1D7D98-A11F-46D8-A499-7392FCCCAA3F}"
Attribute VB_GlobalNameSpace = False
Attribute VB_Creatable = False
Attribute VB_PredeclaredId = True
Attribute VB_Exposed = False
Attribute VB_TemplateDerived = False
Attribute VB_Customizable = False
Option Explicit
Dim ListLength As Integer
Dim wb As Workbook

Sub initialise()
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Dim cell, scratch As Range
    Dim re As New RegExp
    Dim Name As String
    Dim n As Integer
    
    Set wb = ActiveWorkbook
    Set scratch = wb.Worksheets("Scratch").Columns(ScratchCol)
    
    re.Pattern = "^[A-Z][A-Z]\d\d\d$"
    n = 1
    For Each ws In wb.Worksheets
        Name = ws.Name
        If re.Test(Name) Then
            scratch.Rows(n).value = Trim(Name)
            n = n + 1
        End If
    Next
    For Each cell In wb.Worksheets("Foreign").UsedRange.Columns(1).Cells
        Name = cell.value
        If re.Test(Name) Then
            scratch.Rows(n).value = Name
            n = n + 1
        End If
    Next
    Set scratch = scratch.Resize(n - 1, 1)
    scratch.Sort scratch
    ListBoxModules.Clear
    For Each cell In scratch.Rows
        ListBoxModules.AddItem cell.value
    Next
    ListBoxModules.ListIndex = 0
    
    ' Now do the programmes
    Set scratch = wb.Worksheets("Scratch").Columns(ScratchCol)
    re.Pattern = "^([^a-z]*)_([^a-z]*)$"
    n = 1
    For Each ws In wb.Worksheets
        Name = ws.Name
        If re.Test(Name) Then
            scratch.Rows(n).value = re.Replace(Name, "$1:$2")
            n = n + 1
        End If
    Next
    Set scratch = scratch.Resize(n - 1, 1)
    scratch.Sort scratch
    ListBoxProgrammes.Clear
    ListBoxProgrammes.AddItem "any"
    For Each cell In scratch.Rows
        ListBoxProgrammes.AddItem cell.value
    Next
    ListBoxProgrammes.ListIndex = 0
    
    ' Count the number of pairs
    Set scratch = wb.Worksheets("Scratch").Columns(ListCol)
    n = 1
    ListBoxMandP.Clear
    While scratch.Rows(n).value <> ""
        ListBoxMandP.AddItem scratch.Rows(n).value
        n = n + 1
    Wend
    ListLength = n - 1
End Sub

Private Sub AddButton_Click()
    Dim scratch As Range
    Set scratch = wb.Worksheets("Scratch").Columns(ListCol)
    Dim s As String
    s = ListBoxModules.List(ListBoxModules.ListIndex) & _
        "+" & ListBoxProgrammes.List(ListBoxProgrammes.ListIndex)
    If scratch.Find(s, LookIn:=xlValues) Is Nothing Then
        scratch.Rows(ListLength + 1).value = s
        ListLength = ListLength + 1
        Set scratch = scratch.Resize(ListLength, 1)
        scratch.Sort scratch
        Dim cell As Range
        ListBoxMandP.Clear
        For Each cell In scratch.Rows
            ListBoxMandP.AddItem cell.value
        Next
    End If
End Sub

Private Sub CloseButton_Click()
    Me.Hide
End Sub

Private Sub DelButton_Click()
    Dim n As Integer
    n = ListBoxMandP.ListIndex
    If n >= 0 Then
        ListBoxMandP.RemoveItem n
        wb.Worksheets("Scratch").Cells(n + 1, ListCol).Delete shift:=xlUp
        ListLength = ListLength - 1
    End If
End Sub

Private Sub UserForm_Activate()
    initialise
End Sub

Private Sub UserForm_Click()

End Sub

vba_modules.name: Sorting.bas
vba_modules.code:
Attribute VB_Name = "Sorting"
Option Explicit

Sub SortProgrammes(ByRef control As IRibbonControl)
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Dim tbl As Range
    Dim prog_re As New RegExp
    Dim width As Integer, height As Integer
    Dim order As Integer
    
    prog_re.Pattern = "^([^a-z]*)_([^a-z]*)$"
    For Each ws In ActiveWorkbook.Worksheets
        If prog_re.Test(ws.Name) Then
            Set tbl = ws.UsedRange
            width = tbl.Columns.Count - 1
            height = tbl.Rows.Count - 6
            Set tbl = tbl.Offset(3, 1).Resize(height, width)
            Select Case control.Tag
                Case "name"
                    tbl.Sort key1:=tbl.Columns(1), order1:=xlAscending
                Case "number"
                    tbl.Sort key1:=tbl.Columns(2), order1:=xlAscending, _
                            dataoption1:=xlSortNormal
                Case "mark"
                    tbl.Sort key1:=tbl.Columns(tbl.Columns.Count - 2), _
                            order1:=xlDescending
            End Select
        End If
    Next
End Sub

vba_modules.name: Formatting.bas
vba_modules.code:
Attribute VB_Name = "Formatting"
Option Explicit

Sub FixColumnWidths(ByRef control As IRibbonControl)
    Dim wb As Workbook
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Dim col As Range
    Dim n As Variant
    Dim Hidden As Collection
    
    Set wb = ActiveWorkbook
    For Each ws In wb.Worksheets
        Set Hidden = New Collection
        For Each col In ws.UsedRange.Columns
            If col.Hidden Then
                Hidden.Add col.Column
            End If
        Next col
        ws.UsedRange.Columns.AutoFit
        For Each n In Hidden
            ws.Columns(n).Hidden = True
        Next n
    Next ws
End Sub

Sub hideNames(ByRef control As IRibbonControl, ByRef Pressed As Boolean)
    Dim wb As Workbook
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Dim prog_re As New RegExp, mod_re As New RegExp
    
    prog_re.Pattern = "^([^a-z]*)_([^a-z]*)$"
    mod_re.Pattern = "^[A-Z]+[3-6]\d\d$"
    
    Set wb = ActiveWorkbook
    For Each ws In wb.Worksheets
        If prog_re.Test(ws.Name) Then
            ws.Columns(2).Hidden = Pressed
        ElseIf mod_re.Test(ws.Name) Then
            ws.Columns(1).Hidden = Pressed
        ElseIf ws.Name = "Foreign" Then
            ws.Columns(2).Hidden = Pressed
        End If
    Next
End Sub

Sub RemoveHighlighting(ByRef control As IRibbonControl)
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    
    For Each ws In ActiveWorkbook.Worksheets
        ws.UsedRange.Interior.Pattern = xlPatternNone
    Next
End Sub
